factions.name: Church of Avacyn
factions.agenda: Protect humanity, preserve holy order, and recover Avacyn.

factions.name: People of Shadowgrange
factions.agenda: Survive another season behind walls, wards, and routine.

factions.name: Skirsdag Cult
factions.agenda: Serve demon lords, spread corruption, and exploit fear.

factions.name: House Voldaren
factions.agenda: Rule Stensia through terror, appetite, and bloodline prestige.

factions.name: Siegfried's Host
factions.agenda: Raise an undead army and punish both vampires and cowards.
